name: webchat
description: Multi-platform Automation Testing with Playwright and TypeScript

scripts.test:webchat: npm run build && node dist/main.js webchat && node dist/report-cli.js --open
scripts.test:telegram: npm run build && node dist/main.js telegram && node dist/report-cli.js --open
scripts.test:facebook: npm run build && node dist/main.js facebook && node dist/report-cli.js --open
scripts.test:instagram: npm run build && node dist/main.js instagram && node dist/report-cli.js --open
scripts.test:dhai: npm run build && node dist/main.js dhai && node dist/report-cli.js --open
scripts.test:dhai-wakeup: npm run build && node dist/main.js dhai-wakeup && node dist/report-cli.js --open

author: okinr.testcase
